title: sisymbrium subhastatum
intro: Sisymbrium subhastatum, also known as a species of mustard plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sisymbrium subhastatum include relieving congestion and reducing inflammation in the lungs, which can help alleviate symptoms of asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). Sisymbrium subhastatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
